hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"AUTO-REMINDER (project hook): 1) Ambiguous request, or the thing named does not match current code state -> STOP and ask the user before acting. 2) Before removing any column/feature -> Grep every occurrence of its name; after removing -> Grep again to confirm zero live references. 3) NEVER claim work is done based on intention - only on evidence. For code: read the changed section back and confirm it does what the user asked before saying done. If the user reports it does not appear in the app, do not repeat the same claim - investigate why (wrong location, second source, cache) with Grep/Read first. 4) Any pg28 table change -> re-verify the finalized styling spec in CLAUDE.md Lessons Learned still renders. 5) Git workflow: after committing, push to the FEATURE BRANCH automatically (backup only, does not touch the live app). NEVER push or merge to MAIN without asking the user and getting an explicit yes in the current conversation - main deploys the live Streamlit app, and a yes for an earlier push does not cover new commits. When approved, only claim pushed after push output or git log origin/main confirms the commit landed; a failed or rejected push must be reported as failed, never claimed as success. If the session is ending with commits not yet on main, clearly tell the user what is pending and that the live app does not have it."}}'
